note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.flowplane.zone module functions.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the area of the flow plane zone.

methods.name: discharge
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone flowplane zone discharg (vector).

methods.name: discharge_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone discharg.

methods.name: discharge_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone discharg.

methods.name: discharge_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone discharg.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: flowplane
methods.description: Get the flow plane associated with a given flow plane zone.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: zone.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the flowplane zone. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this flowplane zone is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: zone.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the flowplane zone is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) of a given flow plane zone.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone flowplane zone position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone position.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the flowplane zone extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: zone.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the flowplane zone group name in a given slot.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this flowplane zone is live.

methods.name: velocity
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone flowplane zone veloclity (vector).

methods.name: velocity_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone veloclity.

methods.name: velocity_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone veloclity.

methods.name: velocity_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane zone flowplane zone veloclity.

methods.name: vertex
methods.description: Get a flow plane zone vertex.
